visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with dark hair tied in a bun, wearing a light blue denim sleeveless top and a silver necklace, is seen in a bright, modern kitchen. She holds a small rectangular piece of white yogurt dessert with yellow and red bits, takes a bite, and smiles with satisfaction. She then presents two bags of Kellogg's Granola, one red and one brown. (2) The camera switches to extreme close-up shots of hands preparing the recipe. A container of Greek yogurt is opened, and the lid is licked. The yogurt is poured into a large glass mixing bowl. Subsequently, a generous scoop of mascarpone cheese is added, followed by a drizzle of golden honey from a squeeze bottle. (3) The woman throws a red bag of granola into the air playfully. She then pours the golden-brown cereal clusters into the yogurt mixture. Using a black spatula, she vigorously stirs the ingredients into a thick, chunky white paste. The mixture is then poured into a square metal baking mold lined with clear plastic wrap. (4) The mold is placed inside a clean white freezer. A yellow text overlay appears saying '3 hours later'. After the time skip, the mold is removed, the plastic wrap is peeled back, and the frozen white slab is sliced into bite-sized cubes using a large kitchen knife. (5) The video transitions to a clear product showcase. Three varieties of Kellogg's Granola (Strawberry, Hazelnut Cocoa, and Honey Almond) are displayed. Close-up shots of a hand holding the individual components—cornflakes, grain balls, and dried fruit—are shown with descriptive labels and graphic arrows. (6) In the final phase, the woman sits behind the kitchen counter, eating the granola directly from a small glass bowl with a spoon. She looks directly at the camera, nodding and smiling. She then poses while holding four bags of the granola, emphasizing the 'Reduced Sugar 25%' labeling on the packaging.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 教大家來做餐廳等級的甜點. (2) [Slogan]: 而且免烤箱喔. (3) [Slogan]: 鮮纖穀脆優格冰糕. [Logo]: Kellogg's. (4) [Variety]: 步驟一 希臘優格. (5) [Variety]: 步驟二 馬斯卡彭. (6) [Variety]: 步驟三 少量蜂蜜. (7) [Slogan]: 日本纖穀脆 鮮摘草莓口味. [Variety]: 步驟四. (8) [Variety]: 步驟五 均勻攪拌. (9) [Variety]: 步驟六 倒入模具定型. [Variety]: 偷吃?. (10) [Variety]: 步驟七 放入冰箱冷藏. (11) [Variety]: 3 hours later 冰三小時. (12) [Variety]: 步驟八 脫模切塊. (13) [Slogan]: 完成了！這個冰糕. (14) [Slogan]: 三個小時超好切. (15) [Slogan]: 日本纖穀脆 減糖版新上市！. (16) [Slogan]: 簡單烘烤「非油炸」 嚴選天然穀物!. (17) [Variety]: 多種穀物製成. [Variety]: 大顆果乾. [Variety]: 高纖、5種維生素. (18) [Slogan]: 全新減糖版 -25%以上. (19) [Variety]: 穀物球. [Variety]: 玉米片. (20) [Slogan]: 可以解饞又增加滿足感 每一口都是 真材實料！. (21) [Slogan]: 家樂氏纖穀脆 幫你兼顧 健康、營養 還有美味！. (22) [Variety]: 鮮摘草莓. [Variety]: 榛果可可. [Variety]: 蜂蜜杏仁. (23) [Slogan]: 剛剛好的甜. (24) [Slogan]: 現在賣場有優惠 大家趕快下單 跟我一起做做看吧！. [Slogan]: 減糖25%.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator performing the tutorial and showcase.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair tied back in a bun, wearing a light blue denim tank top and a silver necklace with a star-shaped pendant.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern domestic kitchen featuring white cabinets, a black stovetop, and a white refrigerator. Some kitchenware and product bags are visible on the counters.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy female voice introduces the video with rapid, enthusiastic speech. The background music is an upbeat, synthesizer-heavy pop track with a steady, driving electronic beat. The audio quality is pristine with no background noise. (2) A clear 'pop' sound effect is heard as a container is opened, followed by the wet 'squelch' of yogurt pouring. A 'ding' chime marks the transition to adding mascarpone. The narrator continues in a friendly, instructional tone. (3) A 'whoosh' sound accompanies the woman throwing a bag, followed by a crisp 'crunchy' rustling sound as granola hits the bowl. The rhythmic scraping of a spatula against glass is audible. The BGM remains energetic. (4) A soft 'thud' of a freezer door is followed by a melodic 'ding' for the time skip. The sound of a knife slicing through a firm substance is sharp and satisfying. The narrator's voice maintains high arousal. (5) The audio shifts to a promotional style with 'sparkle' sound effects highlighting product features. The narrator clearly articulates the benefits of the reduced sugar version. The BGM pulse continues steadily. (6) Loud, crisp 'crunch' sounds are featured as the narrator eats, emphasizing texture. A final 'ding' and upbeat BGM swell conclude the audio track. The speech is dense throughout, typical of social media marketing.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Tutorial -> Product Detail -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the new reduced-sugar version of Kellogg's Granola by demonstrating an easy and attractive 'no-bake' yogurt ice cake recipe that viewers can recreate at home.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of Kellogg's packaging, brand name in titles, and verbal recommendation of product benefits.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media 'short-form' editing with fast cuts, bright colors, and energetic sound design to maximize engagement for a commercial product.
